ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the report was published */,
  "report_number" TEXT /* Unique report number assigned by the agency */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "signed_date" TEXT /* Date the report was signed */,
  "agency_response_id" INTEGER /* Reference to agency response linked to the report */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of report (e.g., Advisory, Regulatory) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the report (e.g., Environmental, Health) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES report_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_type_id") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES report_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_agency_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_response_id") REFERENCES agency_responses ("agency_response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agency_responses" (
  "agency_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agency response */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that the response pertains to */,
  "response_title" TEXT /* Title of the agency response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was issued */,
  "response_file" TEXT /* File path to the response document */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the agency response (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "response_category" TEXT /* Category of the agency response (e.g., Formal, Informal) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the agency response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency response was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the agency response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_responses_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agency_responses_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the report (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device or platform used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geolocation or IP address where the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_related_documents" (
  "related_doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each related document */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report that the document relates to */,
  "document_title" TEXT /* Title of the related document */,
  "document_link" TEXT /* Link to the related document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of related document (e.g., appendix, supporting data, image) */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the related document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the related document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the related document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the related document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("related_doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_related_documents_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_value" INTEGER /* Year value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type (e.g., Advisory, Regulatory) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Environmental, Health) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
